universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in Nebraska or Iowa with diabetes or hypertension, with SMS opt-in and not suppressed for SMS, currently active with an active enrollment.
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps, as this is the highest-weighted success metric (conversion_rate at 0.6)
name: High-conversion: Open preventive care gap
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive')
rationale: This bucket targets members with open preventive care gaps, which is the highest-weighted success metric (conversion_rate). These members are more likely to convert to scheduling an appointment. The suggested treatment emphasizes the importance of preventive care and the benefits of staying on top of health screenings.
suggested_treatment: Emphasize the importance of preventive care and the benefits of staying on top of health screenings.
coverage_note: The bucket set covers the entire universe of eligible members, with no meaningful sub-population intentionally excluded.

universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in Nebraska or Iowa with diabetes or hypertension, with SMS opt-in and not suppressed for SMS, currently active with an active enrollment.
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps, as this is the highest-weighted success metric (conversion_rate at 0.6)
name: Medium-conversion: Replied to prior SMS
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'replied' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days')
rationale: This bucket targets members who have replied to prior SMS messages, indicating a higher engagement level. These members are more likely to open and click on the campaign message. The suggested treatment emphasizes the importance of staying connected and the benefits of regular communication.
suggested_treatment: Emphasize the importance of staying connected and the benefits of regular communication.
coverage_note: The bucket set covers the entire universe of eligible members, with no meaningful sub-population intentionally excluded.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'delivered' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'replied' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days')
rationale: This bucket targets members who have received prior SMS messages but have not interacted with them. These members are less likely to convert but still have a potential to engage. The suggested treatment emphasizes the importance of staying informed and the benefits of regular updates.
